project_type: AWS CDK Java application - event-driven sleep audio processing pipeline
build_system: Maven 3.9.10 with maven-compiler-plugin (release 17), maven-surefire-plugin, exec-maven-plugin. Requires proxy config in ~/.m2/settings.xml for network access.
test_framework: JUnit 5 with CDK assertions (Template.fromStack, Match). Tests in src/test/java/com/myorg/. Pattern: @BeforeEach creates stack and template, @Test methods use template.hasResourceProperties/resourceCountIs.
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'mvn test' - all tests must pass. 2. Run 'cdk synth' (requires Node.js + CDK CLI installed) to verify CloudFormation synthesis.
setup_instructions: Maven proxy already configured in ~/.m2/settings.xml. Dependencies downloaded. Run 'mvn test' to verify baseline.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode. Maven Central accessible via proxy (configured in ~/.m2/settings.xml). Java 25 is default but project targets Java 17 (maven-compiler-plugin release=17). NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared for tests (handled by surefire plugin config in pom.xml).
contribution_requirements: Strict TDD: write failing tests FIRST, then implement. Conventional commits. Update ARCHITECTURE.md Mermaid diagram for every construct change. Every CDK construct must have a corresponding assertion test. ARCHITECTURE.md is the source of truth.
key_patterns: Single stack (CdkBaseStack) contains all constructs. Tests use Template.fromStack(stack) pattern with Match utilities. L2 constructs preferred. CallAwsService used for AWS SDK integrations in Step Functions. EventBridge rule uses RuleTargetInput.fromEventPath('$.detail') to pass S3 event detail to state machine.
directory_structure: src/main/java/com/myorg/ - CDK app (CdkBaseApp.java) and stack (CdkBaseStack.java). src/test/java/com/myorg/ - CDK assertion tests (CdkBaseTest.java for S3/EventBridge, StepFunctionsTest.java for state machine). Root: pom.xml, cdk.json, ARCHITECTURE.md, CONTRIBUTING.md.
